#version 310 es
layout(binding = 0, std140) uniform CGlobals {
uint g_VertCount;
 struct g_SourceVBO_type {
uint[3] value;
layout(std430, binding = 1) readonly buffer g_SourceVBO {

 struct g_SourceSkin_type {

layout(std430, binding = 2) readonly buffer g_SourceSkin {

 struct g_mBones_type {
uint[16] value;
layout(std430, binding = 3) readonly buffer g_mBones {
g_mBones_type g_mBones_buf[];
 struct g_MeshVertsOut_type {
uint[3] value;
layout(std430, binding = 0) buffer g_MeshVertsOut {
g_MeshVertsOut_type g_MeshVertsOut_buf[];
vec4 u_xlat0;
bool u_xlatb0;
int u_xlati1;
vec3 u_xlat2;
vec3 u_xlat3;
vec4 u_xlat4;
vec4 u_xlat5;
vec4 u_xlat6;
vec3 u_xlat8;
layout(local_size_x = 64, local_size_y = 1, local_size_z = 1) in;
void main()
    u_xlatb0 = gl_GlobalInvocationID.x>=g_VertCount;
    if(u_xlatb0){
        return;
    //ENDIF
    u_xlat0.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlati1 = int(g_SourceSkin_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]);
    u_xlat8.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat2.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat3.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(32 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(32 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(32 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat4.xyw = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(48 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(48 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[u_xlati1].value[(48 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat5.x = u_xlat8.x;
    u_xlat5.y = u_xlat2.x;
    u_xlat5.z = u_xlat3.x;
    u_xlat5.w = u_xlat4.x;
    u_xlat0.w = 1.0;
    u_xlat5.x = dot(u_xlat5, u_xlat0);
    u_xlat6.x = u_xlat8.y;
    u_xlat6.y = u_xlat2.y;
    u_xlat6.z = u_xlat3.y;
    u_xlat6.w = u_xlat4.y;
    u_xlat5.y = dot(u_xlat6, u_xlat0);
    u_xlat4.x = u_xlat8.z;
    u_xlat4.y = u_xlat2.z;
    u_xlat4.z = u_xlat3.z;
    u_xlat5.z = dot(u_xlat4, u_xlat0);
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat5).x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat5).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat5).z;
    return;

    u_xlat3.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).z].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).z].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).z].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat4.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).z].value[(32 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).z].value[(32 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).z].value[(32 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat5.xyw = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).z].value[(48 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).z].value[(48 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).z].value[(48 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat6.x = u_xlat2.x;
    u_xlat6.y = u_xlat3.x;
    u_xlat6.z = u_xlat4.x;
    u_xlat6.w = u_xlat5.x;
    u_xlat0.w = 1.0;
    u_xlat6.x = dot(u_xlat6, u_xlat0);
    u_xlat7.x = u_xlat2.y;
    u_xlat7.y = u_xlat3.y;
    u_xlat7.z = u_xlat4.y;
    u_xlat7.w = u_xlat5.y;
    u_xlat6.y = dot(u_xlat7, u_xlat0);
    u_xlat5.x = u_xlat2.z;
    u_xlat5.y = u_xlat3.z;
    u_xlat5.z = u_xlat4.z;
    u_xlat6.z = dot(u_xlat5, u_xlat0);
    u_xlat2.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat3.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat4.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(32 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(32 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(32 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat5.xyw = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(48 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(48 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).w].value[(48 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat7.x = u_xlat2.x;
    u_xlat7.y = u_xlat3.x;
    u_xlat7.z = u_xlat4.x;
    u_xlat7.w = u_xlat5.x;
    u_xlat7.x = dot(u_xlat7, u_xlat0);
    u_xlat8.x = u_xlat2.y;
    u_xlat8.y = u_xlat3.y;
    u_xlat8.z = u_xlat4.y;
    u_xlat8.w = u_xlat5.y;
    u_xlat7.y = dot(u_xlat8, u_xlat0);
    u_xlat5.x = u_xlat2.z;
    u_xlat5.y = u_xlat3.z;
    u_xlat5.z = u_xlat4.z;
    u_xlat7.z = dot(u_xlat5, u_xlat0);
    u_xlat0.xyz = u_xlat1.yyy * u_xlat7.xyz;
    u_xlat0.xyz = u_xlat1.xxx * u_xlat6.xyz + u_xlat0.xyz;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).z;
    return;

 struct g_MeshVertsOut_type {
uint[6] value;
layout(std430, binding = 0) buffer g_MeshVertsOut {
g_MeshVertsOut_type g_MeshVertsOut_buf[];
vec4 u_xlat0;
bool u_xlatb0;
vec3 u_xlat1;

vec3 u_xlat5;
vec4 u_xlat6;
vec4 u_xlat7;
vec4 u_xlat8;
vec4 u_xlat9;
vec4 u_xlat10;
vec4 u_xlat11;
vec3 u_xlat12;
vec4 u_xlat13;
layout(local_size_x = 64, local_size_y = 1, local_size_z = 1) in;
void main()
    u_xlatb0 = gl_GlobalInvocationID.x>=g_VertCount;
    if(u_xlatb0){
        return;
    //ENDIF
    u_xlat0 = vec4(uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 3]));
    u_xlat1.xy = vec2(uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]));
    u_xlat2 = vec4(uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceSkin_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceSkin_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceSkin_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceSkin_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 3]));
    u_xlat3.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat4.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat5.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(32 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(32 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(32 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat6.xyw = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(48 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(48 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).z].value[(48 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat7.x = u_xlat3.x;
    u_xlat7.y = u_xlat4.x;
    u_xlat7.z = u_xlat5.x;
    u_xlat7.w = u_xlat6.x;
    u_xlat8.xyz = u_xlat0.xyz;
    u_xlat8.w = 1.0;
    u_xlat0.x = dot(u_xlat7, u_xlat8);
    u_xlat9.x = u_xlat3.y;
    u_xlat9.y = u_xlat4.y;
    u_xlat9.z = u_xlat5.y;
    u_xlat9.w = u_xlat6.y;
    u_xlat0.y = dot(u_xlat9, u_xlat8);
    u_xlat6.x = u_xlat3.z;
    u_xlat6.y = u_xlat4.z;
    u_xlat6.z = u_xlat5.z;
    u_xlat0.z = dot(u_xlat6, u_xlat8);
    u_xlat3.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat4.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat5.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(32 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(32 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(32 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat10.xyw = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(48 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(48 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat2).w].value[(48 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat11.x = u_xlat3.x;
    u_xlat11.y = u_xlat4.x;
    u_xlat11.z = u_xlat5.x;
    u_xlat11.w = u_xlat10.x;
    u_xlat12.x = dot(u_xlat11, u_xlat8);
    u_xlat13.x = u_xlat3.y;
    u_xlat13.y = u_xlat4.y;
    u_xlat13.z = u_xlat5.y;
    u_xlat13.w = u_xlat10.y;
    u_xlat12.y = dot(u_xlat13, u_xlat8);
    u_xlat10.x = u_xlat3.z;
    u_xlat10.y = u_xlat4.z;
    u_xlat10.z = u_xlat5.z;
    u_xlat12.z = dot(u_xlat10, u_xlat8);
    u_xlat3.xyz = u_xlat2.yyy * u_xlat12.xyz;
    u_xlat3.xyz = u_xlat2.xxx * u_xlat0.xyz + u_xlat3.xyz;
    u_xlat1.z = u_xlat0.w;
    u_xlat0.x = dot(u_xlat7.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat0.y = dot(u_xlat9.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat0.z = dot(u_xlat6.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.x = dot(u_xlat11.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.y = dot(u_xlat13.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.z = dot(u_xlat10.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat1.xyz = u_xlat2.yyy * u_xlat4.xyz;
    u_xlat0.xyz = u_xlat2.xxx * u_xlat0.xyz + u_xlat1.xyz;
    u_xlat3.w = u_xlat0.x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).z;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 3] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).w;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).z;
    return;

    u_xlat11.x = u_xlat3.x;
    u_xlat11.y = u_xlat4.x;
    u_xlat11.z = u_xlat5.x;
    u_xlat11.w = u_xlat10.x;
    u_xlat12.x = dot(u_xlat11, u_xlat8);
    u_xlat13.x = u_xlat3.y;
    u_xlat13.y = u_xlat4.y;
    u_xlat13.z = u_xlat5.y;
    u_xlat13.w = u_xlat10.y;
    u_xlat12.y = dot(u_xlat13, u_xlat8);
    u_xlat10.x = u_xlat3.z;
    u_xlat10.y = u_xlat4.z;
    u_xlat10.z = u_xlat5.z;
    u_xlat12.z = dot(u_xlat10, u_xlat8);
    u_xlat3.xyz = u_xlat2.yyy * u_xlat12.xyz;
    u_xlat3.xyz = u_xlat2.xxx * u_xlat0.xyz + u_xlat3.xyz;
    u_xlat1.z = u_xlat0.w;
    u_xlat0.x = dot(u_xlat7.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat0.y = dot(u_xlat9.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat0.z = dot(u_xlat6.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.x = dot(u_xlat11.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.y = dot(u_xlat13.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.z = dot(u_xlat10.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat16.xyz = u_xlat2.yyy * u_xlat4.xyz;
    u_xlat1.xyz = u_xlat2.xxx * u_xlat0.xyz + u_xlat16.xyz;
    u_xlat3.w = u_xlat1.x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).z;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 3] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).w;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat1).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat1).z;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat1).w;
    return;

layout(binding = 0, std140) uniform CGlobals {

 struct g_SourceVBO_type {

 struct g_mBones_type {
uint[16] value;
layout(std430, binding = 3) readonly buffer g_mBones {
g_mBones_type g_mBones_buf[];
 struct g_MeshVertsOut_type {
uint[10] value;
layout(std430, binding = 0) buffer g_MeshVertsOut {
g_MeshVertsOut_type g_MeshVertsOut_buf[];
vec4 u_xlat0;
bool u_xlatb0;
vec4 u_xlat1;

vec4 u_xlat3;

vec4 u_xlat15;
vec3 u_xlat19;
layout(local_size_x = 64, local_size_y = 1, local_size_z = 1) in;
void main()
    u_xlatb0 = gl_GlobalInvocationID.x>=g_VertCount;
    if(u_xlatb0){
        return;
    //ENDIF
    u_xlat0 = vec4(uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 3]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat1 = vec4(uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 3]));
    u_xlat2.xw = vec2(uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(32 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceVBO_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(32 >> 2) + 1]));
    u_xlat3 = vec4(uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceSkin_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceSkin_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceSkin_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]), uintBitsToFloat(g_SourceSkin_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 3]));
    u_xlat4.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat5.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat6.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(32 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(32 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(32 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat7.xyw = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(48 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(48 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).z].value[(48 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat8.x = u_xlat4.x;
    u_xlat8.y = u_xlat5.x;
    u_xlat8.z = u_xlat6.x;
    u_xlat8.w = u_xlat7.x;
    u_xlat9.xyz = u_xlat0.yzw;
    u_xlat9.w = 1.0;
    u_xlat10.x = dot(u_xlat8, u_xlat9);
    u_xlat11.x = u_xlat4.y;
    u_xlat11.y = u_xlat5.y;
    u_xlat11.z = u_xlat6.y;
    u_xlat11.w = u_xlat7.y;
    u_xlat10.y = dot(u_xlat11, u_xlat9);
    u_xlat7.x = u_xlat4.z;
    u_xlat7.y = u_xlat5.z;
    u_xlat7.z = u_xlat6.z;
    u_xlat10.z = dot(u_xlat7, u_xlat9);
    u_xlat4.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat5.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat6.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(32 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(32 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(32 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat12.xyw = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(48 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(48 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(g_mBones_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat3).w].value[(48 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat13.x = u_xlat4.x;
    u_xlat13.y = u_xlat5.x;
    u_xlat13.z = u_xlat6.x;
    u_xlat13.w = u_xlat12.x;
    u_xlat14.x = dot(u_xlat13, u_xlat9);
    u_xlat15.x = u_xlat4.y;
    u_xlat15.y = u_xlat5.y;
    u_xlat15.z = u_xlat6.y;
    u_xlat15.w = u_xlat12.y;
    u_xlat14.y = dot(u_xlat15, u_xlat9);
    u_xlat12.x = u_xlat4.z;
    u_xlat12.y = u_xlat5.z;
    u_xlat12.z = u_xlat6.z;
    u_xlat14.z = dot(u_xlat12, u_xlat9);
    u_xlat4.xyz = u_xlat3.yyy * u_xlat14.xyz;
    u_xlat4.xyz = u_xlat3.xxx * u_xlat10.xyz + u_xlat4.xyz;
    u_xlat0.yz = u_xlat1.xy;
    u_xlat5.x = dot(u_xlat8.xyz, u_xlat0.xyz);
    u_xlat5.y = dot(u_xlat11.xyz, u_xlat0.xyz);
    u_xlat5.z = dot(u_xlat7.xyz, u_xlat0.xyz);
    u_xlat6.x = dot(u_xlat13.xyz, u_xlat0.xyz);
    u_xlat6.y = dot(u_xlat15.xyz, u_xlat0.xyz);
    u_xlat6.z = dot(u_xlat12.xyz, u_xlat0.xyz);
    u_xlat0.xyz = u_xlat3.yyy * u_xlat6.xyz;
    u_xlat0.xyz = u_xlat3.xxx * u_xlat5.yzx + u_xlat0.yzx;
    u_xlat2.yz = u_xlat1.zw;
    u_xlat1.x = dot(u_xlat8.zxy, u_xlat2.xyz);
    u_xlat1.y = dot(u_xlat11.zxy, u_xlat2.xyz);
    u_xlat1.z = dot(u_xlat7.zxy, u_xlat2.xyz);
    u_xlat5.x = dot(u_xlat13.zxy, u_xlat2.xyz);
    u_xlat5.y = dot(u_xlat15.zxy, u_xlat2.xyz);
    u_xlat5.z = dot(u_xlat12.zxy, u_xlat2.xyz);
    u_xlat19.xyz = u_xlat3.yyy * u_xlat5.xyz;
    u_xlat2.xyz = u_xlat3.xxx * u_xlat1.xyz + u_xlat19.xyz;
    u_xlat4.w = u_xlat0.z;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat4).x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat4).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat4).z;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 3] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat4).w;
    u_xlat0.zw = u_xlat2.xy;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).z;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 3] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).w;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(32 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat2).z;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(32 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat2).w;
    return;

    u_xlat19.w = u_xlat6.y;
    u_xlat18.y = dot(u_xlat19, u_xlat9);
    u_xlat6.x = u_xlat3.z;
    u_xlat6.y = u_xlat4.z;
    u_xlat6.z = u_xlat5.z;
    u_xlat18.z = dot(u_xlat6, u_xlat9);
    u_xlat3.xyz = u_xlat2.www * u_xlat18.xyz + u_xlat0.xyz;
    u_xlat1.z = u_xlat0.w;
    u_xlat0.x = dot(u_xlat8.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat0.y = dot(u_xlat10.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat0.z = dot(u_xlat7.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.x = dot(u_xlat12.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.y = dot(u_xlat14.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.z = dot(u_xlat11.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.xyz = u_xlat2.yyy * u_xlat4.xyz;
    u_xlat0.xyz = u_xlat2.xxx * u_xlat0.xyz + u_xlat4.xyz;
    u_xlat4.x = dot(u_xlat15.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.y = dot(u_xlat16.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat4.z = dot(u_xlat13.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat0.xyz = u_xlat2.zzz * u_xlat4.xyz + u_xlat0.xyz;
    u_xlat2.x = dot(u_xlat17.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat2.y = dot(u_xlat19.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat2.z = dot(u_xlat6.yzx, u_xlat1.xyz);
    u_xlat1.xyz = u_xlat2.www * u_xlat2.xyz + u_xlat0.xyz;
    u_xlat3.w = u_xlat1.x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).x;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).z;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(0 >> 2) + 3] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat3).w;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat1).y;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat1).z;
    g_MeshVertsOut_buf[gl_GlobalInvocationID.x].value[(16 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat1).w;
    return;

    u_xlat1 = vec4(uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(0 >> 2) + 3]));
    u_xlat0.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat2.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat4.xyz = u_xlat1.yzw * vec3(vec3(g_Weight, g_Weight, g_Weight)) + u_xlat2.xyz;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat4).x;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat4).y;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat4).z;
    u_xlat4.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat0.xyz = u_xlat0.xyz * vec3(vec3(g_Weight, g_Weight, g_Weight)) + u_xlat4.xyz;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).x;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).y;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).z;
    return;
main
inBlendShapeVertices
<noninit>
inOutMeshVertices
<noninit>
#version 310 es
layout(binding = 0, std140) uniform CGlobals {
uint g_FirstVert;
uint g_VertCount;
float g_Weight;
 struct inBlendShapeVertices_type {
uint[10] value;
layout(std430, binding = 1) readonly buffer inBlendShapeVertices {
inBlendShapeVertices_type inBlendShapeVertices_buf[];
 struct inOutMeshVertices_type {
uint[10] value;
layout(std430, binding = 0) buffer inOutMeshVertices {
inOutMeshVertices_type inOutMeshVertices_buf[];
vec3 u_xlat0;
int u_xlati0;
bool u_xlatb0;
vec4 u_xlat1;
vec4 u_xlat2;
vec3 u_xlat3;
vec3 u_xlat5;
layout(local_size_x = 64, local_size_y = 1, local_size_z = 1) in;
void main()
    u_xlatb0 = gl_GlobalInvocationID.x>=g_VertCount;
    if(u_xlatb0){
        return;
    //ENDIF
    u_xlati0 = int(gl_GlobalInvocationID.x) + int(g_FirstVert);
    u_xlat1 = vec4(uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(0 >> 2) + 3]));
    u_xlat2 = vec4(uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(16 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(16 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(16 >> 2) + 2]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(16 >> 2) + 3]));
    u_xlat0.xy = vec2(uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(32 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inBlendShapeVertices_buf[u_xlati0].value[(32 >> 2) + 1]));
    u_xlat3.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat5.xyz = u_xlat1.yzw * vec3(vec3(g_Weight, g_Weight, g_Weight)) + u_xlat3.xyz;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat5).x;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat5).y;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(0 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat5).z;
    u_xlat5.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat5.xyz = u_xlat2.xyz * vec3(vec3(g_Weight, g_Weight, g_Weight)) + u_xlat5.xyz;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat5).x;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat5).y;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(12 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat5).z;
    u_xlat0.z = u_xlat2.w;
    u_xlat5.xyz = vec3(uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(24 >> 2) + 0]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(24 >> 2) + 1]), uintBitsToFloat(inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(24 >> 2) + 2]));
    u_xlat0.xyz = u_xlat0.zxy * vec3(vec3(g_Weight, g_Weight, g_Weight)) + u_xlat5.xyz;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(24 >> 2)] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).x;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(24 >> 2) + 1] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).y;
    inOutMeshVertices_buf[floatBitsToInt(u_xlat1).x].value[(24 >> 2) + 2] = floatBitsToUint(u_xlat0).z;
    return;

. Arimo offers improved on-screen readability characteristics and the pan-European WGL character set and solves the needs of developers looking for width-compatible fonts to address document portability across platforms.
http://www.ascendercorp.com/
http://www.ascendercorp.com/typedesigners.html
Licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1
http://scripts.sil.org/OFL
Liberation Sans
Arial
